hero.headline: Command Every Room.
hero.sub: A tablet-first control panel for video walls and monitoring environments. Execute layouts, scenarios and automations with a single tap.

problem.label: The Problem
problem.title: Control rooms are fragmented.
problem.description: Operators juggle separate apps for video walls, cameras, lighting, sensors and alarms. Every action requires training, multiple tools and precious seconds.
problem.solution_description: GroundCTRL unifies all controls into a single configurable dashboard. Tap once to switch a video wall layout, trigger an emergency scenario or show incident cameras.

features.label: Features
features.title: Everything your control room needs.
features.subtitle: Purpose-built for professionals who can't afford to waste time.

items.title: Video Wall Control
items.description: Send layouts, presets and commands to Barco video walls via REST API. Switch content in under a second.

items.title: One-Tap Scenarios
items.description: Pre-configured scenarios like Emergency Mode, Default Layout or Incident Map — triggered instantly.

items.title: Camera Integration
items.description: Connect Milestone, Verkada, Bosch and other VMS platforms. Show the right cameras automatically.

items.title: Multi-Connector
items.description: Integrates with Node-RED, Power Automate, Crestron, Q-SYS and Extron for full environment control.

items.title: Tablet-First Design
items.description: Built for iPad and Android tablets. Touch-optimized interface designed for demanding environments.

items.title: No App Store Required
items.description: Deploy instantly via sideload. No App Store approval wait. No delays when your client needs it now.

usecases.label: Use Cases
usecases.title: Built for every critical environment.
usecases.subtitle: Wherever operators monitor, protect or control — GroundCTRL fits.

items.title: Security Operations Centers
items.description: Manage video walls, alarms and camera feeds from a single tablet.

items.title: Network Operations Centers
items.description: Display dashboards, network maps and alerts on demand.

items.title: Airports & Ports
items.description: Coordinate operations and security monitoring across large facilities.

items.title: Hospitals
items.description: Control procedure room environments and monitoring displays.

items.title: Energy & Industry
items.description: Manage process monitoring and incident response on the floor.

items.title: Command & Control
items.description: Execute multi-system scenarios from a single authorized panel.

demo.label: See It In Action
demo.title: Designed for the operator, not the technician.
demo.subtitle: A clean, dark interface built to be read at a distance and touched with confidence.

pricing.label: Pricing
pricing.title: Enterprise pricing, tailored to your deployment.
pricing.subtitle: GroundCTRL is licensed per installation. Contact us for a proposal.
pricing.note: Payment via international wire transfer. USD and EUR accepted.

checkout.title: Payment Instructions
checkout.subtitle: International Wire Transfer
checkout.warning: The Beneficiary field must contain exactly the company name shown below. Using the owner's name may cause delays or cancellation.
checkout.after_transfer: After completing the transfer, send proof of payment via WhatsApp.

footer.tagline: Command Every Room. From One Dashboard.
